Zeroing in on (formerly Value cascading or cascading) is an element of [[Relevance realization]] where an organism focuses its attention on something after deciding it is relevant and then makes decisions based on this zoomed in model.

Perversion of the function is responsible for [[spiralling]]

== See Also ==

* [[Transparency opacity shift]]

[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Zeroing in]][[sn:Zeroing in]][[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Zeroing in]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
